top_signals.title: Goldman Sees August US Diesel Crunch as Stocks Lowest Since 2003
top_signals.summary: Diesel stocks in the US risk reaching a critical threshold of 20 days of supply by August if commercial inventories keep declining at the recent pace amid the near-complete closure of the Strait of Hormuz, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc.’s co-head of global commodities research.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Swearing-in of commissioner returns U.S. maritime regulator to full strength
top_signals.summary:
The Federal Maritime Commission regulator filled its remaining vacant seat with yet another Florida native.

The post Swearing-in of commissioner returns U.S. maritime regulator to full strength appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Kevin Warsh’s Fed Regime Change Comes With a Catch - Bloomberg
top_signals.summary: Kevin Warsh’s Fed Regime Change Comes With a Catch  Bloomberg
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Standard Chartered says Strategy’s bitcoin sale may mark start of ETH outperformance
top_signals.summary: Standard Chartered said Ethereum DATs have an advantage over bitcoin DATs because ETH's staking yield means they do not need to sell ETH.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Transportation pricing index logs record growth rate in May
top_signals.summary:
Transportation prices surged significantly throughout May, according to a monthly poll of supply chain executives, as available capacity remained on the decline.

The post Transportation pricing index logs record growth rate in May appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Trump appoints ally as acting director of US national intelligence
top_signals.summary: Housing industry executive Bill Pulte has no known experience in national security

top_signals.title: Starmer uses disappearing messages, admits Downing Street
top_signals.summary: Publication of latest batch of Mandelson files triggers fresh scrutiny of government record-keeping

top_signals.title: Le Groupe ALMACO Expands Québec Network to Support Shipbuilding Programs
top_signals.summary: Le Groupe ALMACO is strengthening its local operations across Québec through increased hiring and expanded contracting of regional suppliers and subcontractors. The initiative supports upcoming accommodation and cabin work for vessels under construction at Chantier Davie Canada Inc.
